candidates.experience_summary: I don’t have the exact experience for the roles selected. However, I have built a large social media following for a few people.
I have a decade of healthcare experience
Certified professional medical biller with 6+ years of experience managing outpatient billing, prior authorizations, and claims resolution for multispecialty practices.
Experienced remote patient coordinator skilled in EMR data entry, appointment scheduling, insurance verification, and compassionate patient communication.
Healthcare digital marketing specialist with 4+ years of experience running social media campaigns, provider referral outreach, and practice growth initiatives.

job_postings.title: Marketing Associate
job_postings.description: We are seeking a creative, professional, and compassionate Marketing Associate to join Amber's Healthcare Services in East Baton Rouge. The candidate will manage digital marketing campaigns, handle referral partner outreach, and coordinate healthcare educational activities. Prior experience in professional services or healthcare marketing is a plus.
job_postings.interview_formats: ["Virtual Video Call", "Phone-Only Interview", "Written Questionnaire / Email Interview", "Virtual Video Call (Questions provided 48h in advance)"]

job_postings.title: Remote Patient Intake Coordinator
job_postings.description: Austin Medical Group is hiring a Remote Patient Intake Coordinator to manage new patient registration, insurance verification, and electronic medical records intake. Must have strong phone etiquette and medical software proficiency.
job_postings.interview_formats: ["Virtual Video Call", "Phone-Only Interview", "Written Questionnaire / Email Interview", "Virtual Video Call (Questions provided 48h in advance)"]

job_postings.title: Remote Medical Billing & Claims Specialist
job_postings.description: Denver Health Partners seeks a Remote Medical Billing Specialist to handle medical claims processing, ICD-10 coding, EMR auditing, and claim denial follow-ups for our outpatient specialty clinics.
job_postings.interview_formats: ["Virtual Video Call", "Phone-Only Interview", "Written Questionnaire / Email Interview", "Virtual Video Call (Questions provided 48h in advance)"]

job_postings.title: Remote Practice Operations Lead
job_postings.description: Heartland Health Clinic is recruiting a Remote Practice Operations Lead to oversee administrative workflows, staff scheduling, patient communication protocols, and practice billing compliance.
job_postings.interview_formats: ["Virtual Video Call", "Phone-Only Interview", "Written Questionnaire / Email Interview", "Virtual Video Call (Questions provided 48h in advance)"]

job_postings.title: Remote Medical Prior Authorization Coordinator
job_postings.description: Atlanta Care Alliance is seeking a Remote Medical Prior Authorization Coordinator to process prior authorization requests with commercial and Medicaid insurers, verify benefits, and coordinate with clinical teams.
job_postings.interview_formats: ["Virtual Video Call", "Phone-Only Interview", "Written Questionnaire / Email Interview", "Virtual Video Call (Questions provided 48h in advance)"]
